import { useRef, useEffect } from "react"; const Administrators=()=>{ const tableRef = useRef(null) useEffect(() => { const $table = window.$(tableRef.current) // Initialize DataTable $table.DataTable({ destroy: true, // avoids re-initialization errors paging: true, searching: true, buttons: ["copy", "csv", "excel", "pdf", "print"] }) // Cleanup on unmount return () => { if (window.$.fn.DataTable.isDataTable(tableRef.current)) { $table.DataTable().destroy() } } }, []) return ( <>
